heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3406 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration to carry out this subchapter $60,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 20281So in original. Probably should be followed by a period.1
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “this subchapter $60,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2028” for “this subchapter—” and struck out pars. (1) to (7) which authorized appropriations for fiscal years 2009 through 2015.Pub. L. 117–263
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “this subchapter $60,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2028” for “this subchapter—” and struck out pars. (1) to (7) which authorized appropriations for fiscal years 2009 through 2015.Pub. L. 117–263
